items.title: Saudis must recognise Israel for nuclear deal, says Trump
items.dek: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
items.body: The US president says the landmark agreement to help Saudis develop nuclear energy is dependent on it joining the Abraham Accords.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ghanaians' ICC petition over migrant attacks 'opportunistic', says South Africa
items.dek: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity.
items.body: The petition argues the violence against migrants in South Africa could amount to crimes against humanity.
items.author: IriLine Desk
